_comment_1: Example/schema manifest for scripts/deploy-verifier.mjs. Replace placeholder values (contract addresses, RPC URLs, chain ID, zkey path) with your actual deployment values before running. The verifier auto-skips any top-level section that is absent.
_comment_2: Public Midnight network endpoints (preview / preprod / mainnet) and the matching expectedGenesisHash are NETWORK CONSTANTS, not placeholders — leave them as-is unless you are switching networks or running a Cloudflare Worker reverse-proxy (see references/network-chooser.md § 3 and § Genesis hash table).
_comment_3: To enable the wallet-sync and proof-server checks, rename the keys '_proofServer_disabled' → 'proofServer' and '_wallet_disabled' → 'wallet', and ensure both services are running locally on the documented ports.
_comment_4: Run from the skill root: `node scripts/deploy-verifier.mjs assets/deploy-manifest.example.json` (you will see SKIPs until you fill in real deployment values). For a private real-data manifest, create deploy-manifest.local.json (gitignored) alongside this file.
_expectedGenesisHash_comment: Network constant. Preview = the value below; preprod = derive per-deploy via indexer; mainnet = look up in references/network-chooser.md.

midnight._contractAddress_comment: Your deployed Midnight HTLC / contract address: 0x + 64 hex chars (32 bytes).

evm._rpcUrl_comment: Your EVM RPC. For Arbitrum Sepolia: https://sepolia-rollup.arbitrum.io/rpc
evm._chainId_comment: REQUIRED: positive integer EVM chain ID. Arbitrum Sepolia=421614, Base Sepolia=84532, mainnet=1. The verifier rejects 0 (which would silently disable the chain-ID guard).

groth16Verifier._address_comment: Your deployed Groth16 verifier contract address (40 hex chars).
groth16Verifier._localZkeyPath_comment: Path to the local .zkey that the deployed verifier was generated from. Relative to manifest location is fine.
